description: Revoke a single consent grant by id, or all matching grants by (dappOrigin, chain?, walletAddress?).

revoked.description: Number of active grants revoked by this call.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Neither id nor dappOrigin provided, or malformed parameters.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana if provided.
